CustomField.formula:
IF( OR(
ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_1__c, "SPS - (ALH) SYSTEMS SAMPLE PREP & HTS") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_2__c, "SPS - (ALH) SYSTEMS SAMPLE PREP & HTS") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_3__c, "SPS - (ALH) SYSTEMS SAMPLE PREP & HTS"), INCLUDES(Product_Interest__c, "Sample Prep Systems - SPS"), INCLUDES(Product_Line__c, "SPS"), INCLUDES(BD_Product_Family_Interest__c, "14-SPS")),
"TRUE", "FALSE")
CustomField.label: Summary-SPS
